TEAM_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Meet the experts behind Style Plan(it). We combine the immigrant experience with high-end professional styling for Toronto's ambitious professionals.
TEAM_PAGE_TITLE: Our Team | Personal Styling Experts Toronto | Style Plan(it)
VALUE_LEAD: When you know who you are, you move differently. We architect the strategy behind your style so you can focus on what matters — your only job is to show up.
VALUE_PILLAR_1_TEXT: Style isn't just for big events — it's for the slow, everyday moments. Moving with instinctual confidence from your morning coffee to your night routine.
VALUE_PILLAR_2_TEXT: The average person spends 100+ hours a year deciding what to wear. We reclaim that time so you can focus on your legacy.
VALUE_PILLAR_3_TEXT: In a world of split-second judgments, your image is your silent negotiator. We master the physics of first impressions so you command respect before you say a word.
